Reasonable projections of appropriation increases for the next budget year (i.e. : increases in debt service payments due to new or restructured debt; increases in lease payments due to new or restructured leases; increased salary or compensation payments attributable to contractual obligations; and other increases in items of expenditure for which policy changes or decisions will necessitate increased appropriations)
